inputs.label: Refractive Index
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the lens material (dimensionless, typically 1.3-2.0).

inputs.label: Radius R1
inputs.businessContext: Radius of curvature of the first lens surface. Positive for convex, negative for concave.

inputs.label: Radius R2
inputs.businessContext: Radius of curvature of the second lens surface. Positive for convex, negative for concave.

inputs.label: Center Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Center thickness of the lens along the optical axis.
